hero.description: Your ultimate destination for retro classics and modern hits. Buy, sell, and trade games spanning every era — from dusty Atari cartridges to the latest PS5 titles.
hero.mascotLine: ⚔️ Guarded by Valerie the Viking — our warrior mascot who battles bad deals so you don't have to.

services.heading: Our Services
services.subheading: From trade-ins to restoration — Valerie the Viking keeps watch over every transaction. Here's everything we offer under one roof.

items.title: Buy & Sell Games
items.description: Trade in your old games for cash or store credit. We buy and sell titles from every era — Atari, NES, SNES, N64, PS1, PS2, GameBoy, Wii, Xbox, PS4/5, Switch, and everything in between.

items.title: Gaming Accessories
items.description: Controllers, cables, memory cards, headsets, adapters, and more. We stock accessories for vintage and modern consoles. Rare finds and everyday essentials in one place.

items.title: Console Reconditioning
items.description: Breathe new life into your old consoles. We clean, repair, and recondition everything from vintage units to finicky disc drives. Get it working like the day it was made.

items.title: Disc Resurfacing
items.description: Scratched discs killing your save file? Our professional disc resurfacing service removes scratches and restores readability. We handle PS1, PS2, PS3, Wii, DVD, and more.

guarantee.title: The Valerie Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every game we sell is tested and verified before hitting our shelves. Valerie doesn't let bad deals pass through — if a game doesn't work, we make it right. No questions asked.

reconditioning.heading: Console Reconditioning & Disc Resurfacing
reconditioning.subheading: Don't throw out your broken classics — bring them to us. Our technicians restore consoles and discs to their former glory. Valerie's standards are high: if it leaves our shop, it works.

console.title: Console Reconditioning
console.description: From a dusty N64 to a scratchy PS2 disc drive — we clean, repair, and restore your consoles to working condition.
console.footnote: NES · SNES · N64 · PS1 · PS2 · GameCube · Wii and more

disc.title: Disc Resurfacing
disc.description: Don't throw away a game because of scratches. Our resurfacing machine removes surface damage and restores readability on most discs.
features: Most discs restored in one pass
disc.footnote: PS1 · PS2 · PS3 · Wii · GameCube · DVD

reconditioning.pricingNote: Pricing varies by service complexity. Most repairs completed within 3–5 business days.

whyUs.heading: Why Choose Us
whyUs.subheading: In a world of online marketplaces and big-box retailers, Dream Quest is something different. A place where games are respected, history is preserved, and every customer matters.

trustPoints.title: Every Game Tested
trustPoints.description: We test every single game before it hits our shelves. No mystery cartridges. No disc roulette. What you buy works — period.

trustPoints.title: Fair Trade-In Prices
trustPoints.description: Valerie doesn't let bad deals through. We offer competitive prices for your trade-ins — check our current rates or bring in your collection for a free quote.

trustPoints.title: Passion-Driven
trustPoints.description: We're gamers first, store owners second. Our team plays everything from Atari to modern-day. That passion shows in how we curate inventory and serve every customer.

trustPoints.title: Satisfaction Guarantee
trustPoints.description: Not happy with your purchase? Bring it back. We stand behind everything we sell. Valerie's reputation is on the line with every transaction.

trustPoints.title: Massive Selection
trustPoints.description: From Atari 2600 to PS5, we carry hundreds of titles across all eras. Rare finds, budget grabs, and everything in between — one store, one roof.

trustPoints.title: Community First
trustPoints.description: Dream Quest isn't a faceless chain — we're a local store built by gamers for gamers. We know our customers' names, not just their loyalty card numbers.

mascotStory.heading: The Legend of Valerie the Viking
mascotStory.quote: "Every cartridge tells a story. Make sure it's a good one." — Valerie
paragraphs: Valerie the Viking didn't choose the quest — the quest chose her. A warrior of pixels and persistence, she once roamed the digital realms from Atari dungeons to PS5 boss battles. She's seen every era, fought every final boss, and traded in every game imaginable.
Now she guards the Dream Quest vault, ensuring every game that passes through her hands is worthy of a new player's shelf. She's the reason we don't sell junk. She won't allow it.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subheading: Have a question about our inventory? Want to sell your collection? Need a repair quote? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you're looking for, what you want to sell, or what needs repair...
form.successMessage: Valerie has your message. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.description: Your local destination for retro and modern video games, accessories, and console restoration services.
